title: 3999 BBY
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Year |image= |conflict= |chancellor= |chief= |head= |emperor= |events= |eras=[[Old Republic era]]}} {{Quote|Your destiny awaits, Nomi Sunrider.''"
"''I…I'm not sure I want it. I never wanted to ''be'' a warrior. I never wanted to play a part in any galactic battles!''"
"''A Jedi does not seek out battles, but neither does she turn her back on battle, when it finds her.|Thon and Nomi Sunrider|audio=NomiThon.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]}} The following events took place in '''3999 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''. ==Battles== {{Quote|I was wondering how I could '''trick''' you into battle, heheh. It looks like this is a golden opportunity!''"
"''Battle?!? We have to get away!''"
"''Run? No! Fight!|Thon, to Nomi Sunrider|audio=NomiThon-Skirmish.flac|}} ==Deaths== {{Quote|Andur! '''Andur'''! He's '''dead'''! You've '''killed''' my husband!|Sunrider, upon witnessing the murder of Andur|audio=HesDead-TotJaudio.flac|}} *[[Dreebo]] in [[Stenness Node]] *On the [[Stenness Hyperspace Terminal]] **[[Andur Sunrider]] **[[Quanto]] **[[Rek (enforcer)|Rek]] *[[Roko]] on [[Vo Dasha]] *[[C'borp]] on [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]] ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|26|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ---- {{Years-OSW}} {{Interlang |el=3999 ΠΜΓ |es=3.999 ABY |fi=3999 BBY |pt=3.999 ABY }} [[Category:Years in the Old Sith Wars]]
